CAI is a global technology services firm with over 8,500
associates worldwide and a yearly revenue of $1 billion+. We
have over 40 years of excellence in uniting talent and
technology to power the possible for our clients,
colleagues, and communities. As a privately held company, we
have the freedom and focus to do what is right—whatever it
takes. Our tailor-made solutions create lasting results
across the public and commercial sectors, and we are
trailblazers in bringing neurodiversity to the enterprise.

Job Summary

We are looking for a motivated AI Developer with experience
in .NET core and Angular, ready to take us to the next
level! If you have strong experience with AI, Machine
Learning, .NET Core, and Azure and are looking for your next
career move, apply now.

Job Description

We are looking for an AI Developer skilled in tweaking AI
brains, integrating various data sources into the knowledge
base (including company databases), and building chatbots
and intelligent agents. The ideal candidate should be
proficient in fine-tuning models and have experience with
Azure AI Foundry. This position will be full-time and
remote.

What You'll Do:

- Create an application for stock taking, speech to text with
  recognition of the IFS products and automatically transfer
  it into an inventory. This may also be applied in offline
  functionality
- Automate the retrieval of invoices with power automate from
  our invoices mailbox and then process the invoices
  automatically
- Optimize the overall OCR process and scanning
- Possibly apply AI or ML in existing and future applications

What You'll Need:

Required:

- Candidate must have a profound knowledge of how AI & ML
  works
- Must have knowledge on the following technologies: Angular
  14 and up; .NET Core; Azure SQL Database; Microsoft Azure;
  Azure Logic Apps; Azure Foundry; Azure OpenAI;

Preferred:

- SSRS
- Progressive Web Application (PWA)
- Optical Character Recognition (OCR)

Physical Demands

- Ability to safely and successfully perform the essential job
  functions
- Sedentary work that involves sitting or remaining stationary
  most of the time with occasional need to move around the
  office to attend meetings, etc.
- Ability to conduct repetitive tasks on a computer, utilizing
  a mouse, keyboard, and monitor

Reasonable accommodation statement

If you require a reasonable accommodation in completing this
application, interviewing, completing any pre-employment
testing, or otherwise participating in the employment
selection process, please direct your inquiries to
application.accommodations@cai.io or (888) 824 – 8111.
responsibilities: Create stock taking application with speech-to-text recognition for IFS products and automatic inventory transfer

Optimize OCR processes and scanning workflows
Apply AI or ML capabilities to existing and future applications
Fine-tune AI models and integrate data sources into knowledge bases
use_cases: Speech-to-text inventory management system with product recognition

ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves directly building AI systems including
fine-tuning models, building chatbots and intelligent
agents, integrating data into knowledge bases, and
implementing Azure AI Foundry solutions. The position
requires hands-on work deploying and optimizing AI/ML models
for production use cases.
